description: A legacy mainframe system has provided a shipment log file at /home/ga/Desktop/shipment_logs.dat. Load this data into the Oracle HR database (User: hr, Pass: hr123, PDB: XEPDB1) into a new table named SHIPMENT_HISTORY. The file is Fixed Width text with this layout: Lines 1-2 are headers to be skipped; Pos 1-10: Shipment ID (Integer); Pos 11-13: Origin Airport (3-char); Pos 14-16: Destination Airport (3-char); Pos 17-24: Date (YYYYMMDD); Pos 25-30: Weight kg (Integer); Pos 31-40: Cost (Implied 2 decimals); Pos 41-42: Status Code ('00'=Pending, '10'=Shipped, '99'=Void). Create the table with appropriate data types and use SQL*Loader to load the data, converting the Date string to an Oracle DATE, dividing Cost by 100, and filtering out records with Status '99'. Save the control file to /home/ga/Desktop/load_shipments.ctl.
